calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner; Setting Hearing On Distribution Of Surplus Proceeds; Directing The Clerk To Discharge The Peititoner Upon Deposit Of The Surplus Proceeds
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SUNRISE ASSESSMENT SERVICES INC. FKA , TLS ASSESSMENT SERVICE, INC. Motion For Order Depositing Surplus Proceeds From The Sale And Discharging Petitioner; Setting Hearing On Distribution Of Surplus Proceeds; Directing The Clerk To Discharge The Peititoner Upon Deposit Of The Surplus Proceeds is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
